note: Hybrid realism: 168 synthesized Chinese office .docx files across several common corporate document types (v7 had 150; v8 added 18 cross-genre adversarial docs whose filenames mislead and whose content carries the true category). Content uses natural corporate phrasing; names and figures are synthetic because real company documents contain PII. Some files intentionally require reading primary intent instead of classifying from filenames alone.

entries.description: 168 synthesized Chinese corporate .docx files with messy filenames, timestamp variants, English placeholders, and mojibake-style names. The 18 v8 additions are all cross-genre — filename hint and body content disagree.
